title: Personal Website
description: This beautiful website :)

title: Lost and Found Mobile App
description: A Lost and Found mobile app that allows users to post items. It matches items using an algorithm by comparing the images, categories and item attributes.

title: Advent of Code
description: I participate in the Advent of Code programming challenges over the Christmas period every year.

title: Speed Reader
description: A website that displays words in the same position, at increasing speeds, allowing us to read in a higher WPM.

title: Job Tracker
description: A job tracker website prototype, as an extension to Trackr, designed for entry-level job seekers.

title: Route Finder and Visualisation Website
description: A visualiser of a transport network, including showing the shortest path between two points using Dijkstra's algorithm.

title: Mini-C Compiler
description: A parser for a C-like mini-C language to generate abstract syntax trees, and a LLVM IR generator.

title: The Ground Tilter
description: A Unity game that moves the player to the goal by tilting the ground.

title: Recipe App
description: A recipe and meal planning app for university life, with an algorithm to recommend recipes by utilising leftover ingredients.

title: Wallstreet Whisperer
description: A website that visualises stock prices and news articles from APIs, and make prediction on prices using sentiment analysis.

title: Resolution (Logic) Solver
description: A resolution (logic) solver to determine if a conjunctive normal form sentence is a tautology.

title: Gig System Database Design
description: Implemented database design with complex queries, for a gig event system.

title: Agent for the Connect Game
description: An AI agent to play the connect game (an expansion of connect four), using the minimax algorithm with alpha-beta pruning.

title: Intrusion Detection System
description: A multithreaded system that identifies SYN attacks and ARP cache poisoning attacks, by parsing TCP headers.

title: Personal Discord Bot
description: A lightweight Discord Bot providing utility features that friendly servers may need.

title: The Giginator Website
description: An event and ticket creation and management system, with users classified into regular users and admins.

title: The Bean's Gambit Game
description: An AI player for the Bean's Gambit game implemented using Haskell, which is a game similar to chess.

title: Warwick Plus Movie Platform
description: A platform to display and query movies, ratings and casts efficiently using data structures such as an AVL tree.

title: Robot Arm Tower of Hanoi Solver
description: A moving robot arm to solve the Tower of Hanoi problem, controlled using C.

title: Robot Maze Navigator
description: A Java robot controller to navigate in a maze, using different approaches such as Depth-first search.
